params.name: Pioneer 11
params.description:
On Jun 17, 1973 AD, the interstellar probe, developed by NASA, was launched from Cape Canaveral.
Pioneer 11 is three meters long and weighs about 300 kilograms, driven by six ammonia-powered thrusters. Its main mission was to explore the outer reaches of the solar system, study interstellar matter around Mars, the Jupiter environment, and its asteroid belt, and investigate Saturn's rings and satellites. In addition, it carried a gold-plated aluminum plate containing images of a male and femal …
